package.name: mserve_camera
package.description: Lifecycle-managed camera node for mServe. Wraps v4l2_camera's V4l2CameraDevice (raw V4L2 device access, not the whole v4l2_camera_node) so bringup/shutdown is gated the same way as mserve_drivechain/mserve_base via lifecycle_manager. Publishes standard sensor_msgs/Image + CameraInfo, plus a hand-rolled JPEG-compressed camera/image_raw/compressed for bandwidth-constrained subscribers (Foxglove, RViz over WiFi).
